slots.name: incident_name
slots.description: List of incident names to subscribe. Used to fill the subscription condition.
slots.value_constraint: Must be a valid list of incident names.

slots.name: incident_level
slots.description: List of incident severity levels to subscribe. Used to filter subscription condition.
slots.value_constraint: Must be one or more of: critical, major, minor, warning.

slots.name: extra_incident_subscription_condition
slots.description: Additional explanation for subscription condition. Used to fill the subscription condition.
slots.example: Only subscribe to alarm events from specific vendor devices.
slots.value_constraint: Free-form description of extra subscription condition requirements.

slots.name: extra_incident_basic_info
slots.description: Additional requirements for incident basic information in the reported event data format.
slots.example: Include device model and firmware version in basic info.
slots.value_constraint: Free-form description of extra basic info requirements.

slots.name: extra_incident_analysis_result
slots.description: Additional requirements for incident analysis result in the reported event data format.
slots.example: Provide root cause analysis and recommended remediation steps.
slots.value_constraint: Free-form description of extra analysis result requirements.

slots.name: extra_incident_business_impact
slots.description: Additional requirements for business impact assessment in the reported event data format.
slots.example: Include affected service count and customer impact level.
slots.value_constraint: Free-form description of extra business impact requirements.
